features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.description: When you hit a creature with a Flurry of Blows attack, you can impose one effect: it must succeed on a Dexterity save or be knocked prone; it must succeed on a Strength save or be pushed 15 feet away; or it can't take reactions until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.description: Use your action to regain hit points equal to three times your monk level. Once used, you must finish a long rest before using it again.

features.name: Tranquility
features.description: At the end of a long rest, you gain the effect of a sanctuary spell (save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier) that lasts until your next rest or until you attack or cast a hostile spell.

features.name: Quivering Palm
features.description: When you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, spend 3 ki points to start imperceptible vibrations that last for days equal to your monk level. As an action you can end them: the target must make a Constitution save or drop to 0 hit points (10d10 necrotic damage on a success).

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: While you wear no armor and don't wield a shield, your Armor Class equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: While unarmed or wielding only monk weapons and wearing no armor or shield: use Dexterity for attack and damage rolls, roll a d4 in place of normal damage, and make one unarmed strike as a bonus action after attacking with an unarmed strike or monk weapon.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: Your Martial Arts die is a d6 (Dexterity for attacks, bonus-action unarmed strike).

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: Your Martial Arts die is a d8 (Dexterity for attacks, bonus-action unarmed strike).

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: Your Martial Arts die is a d10 (Dexterity for attacks, bonus-action unarmed strike).

features.name: Ki
features.description: Spend ki points (equal to your monk level, regained on rest) to fuel Flurry of Blows (1 ki: two bonus-action unarmed strikes after attacking), Patient Defense (1 ki: bonus-action Dodge), and Step of the Wind (1 ki: bonus-action Disengage or Dash, jump distance doubled). Ki save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: Your speed increases by 10 feet while you wear no armor and wield no shield.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: Your speed increases by 15 feet while unarmored.

features.name: Unarmored Movement Improvement
features.description: You can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids on your turn without falling during the move.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: Your speed increases by 20 feet while unarmored.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: Your speed increases by 25 feet while unarmored.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: Your speed increases by 30 feet while unarmored.

features.name: Deflect Missiles
features.description: Use your reaction to deflect or catch a ranged weapon attack that hits you, reducing the damage by 1d10 + your Dexterity modifier + your monk level. If reduced to 0, you can catch the missile and spend 1 ki point to throw it back.

features.name: Slow Fall
features.description: Use your reaction when you fall to reduce falling damage by five times your monk level.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Stunning Strike
features.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, spend 1 ki point to attempt a stunning strike: the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
features.description: Your unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: When subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity saving throw for half damage, you take no damage on a success and only half on a failure.

features.name: Stillness of Mind
features.description: Use your action to end one effect on yourself that is causing you to be charmed or frightened.

features.name: Purity of Body
features.description: You are immune to disease and poison.

features.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
features.description: You understand all spoken languages, and any creature that can understand a language understands what you say.

features.name: Diamond Soul
features.description: You gain proficiency in all saving throws. When you fail a saving throw, you can spend 1 ki point to reroll it and take the second result.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.description: Your ki sustains you: you suffer none of the frailty of old age and can't be aged magically. You no longer need food or water.

features.name: Empty Body
features.description: Spend 4 ki points to become invisible for 1 minute (with resistance to all damage but force), or 8 ki points to cast astral projection on yourself.

features.name: Perfect Self
features.description: When you roll for initiative and have no ki points remaining, you regain 4 ki points.

tools: One type of artisan's tools or one musical instrument
